ddt:Target.Name: R_X61_EV_LBC2_v5
ddt:Target.Description:
2009/9/8 NISSAN XX4 O.Sato Create
2009/9/15 RDBLID comp 2009/9/18 DTC comp 2009/9/18 DID comp
2009/12/3 Modify for S2 XX4 O.Sato
2010/12/17 Updating LIDs and DTCs l Correcting PartNumberBasicPartList
2011/02/11 Create new database for LBC2 from LBC1 database.
2011/04/06 Change ECU name from LBC to LBC2
2011/09/13 Updating DIDs used as Snapshots (same as LBC1 ones)
2011/10/13 Updating DID used as Snapshots -> all context
2012/06/05 Ajout des DID 1428 et 1429
2014/04/04 Size for Tracability from 16 bytes to 20 bytes
2011/10/24 Updating DID 140A: new name: "140A_AD value of 2,5V Reference voltage" and calibration Mask of DID 1404 1405 1406 1409 140F1414 1418 141A 141B Updating DID 1429:Bit OffSet change to 5
2012/06/05 Updating DID 1428: Bit offset change to 6 modification of screens
2012/06/05 add 1906 as request by spec B, but not implemented in the SW.
2012/08/31 correction cell voltage screenshot (cells 50 to 60 were duplicated)

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Count High voltage connector connect/disconnect counter
Clear High voltage connector connect/disconnect counter

21_64_#03_Number of times where AVCC NG occurs during a life
21_05_#71_B1_Poor Joint Output port ON request flag
21_61_#16_Sum of kWh from beginning of Battery life
3B_64_#03_Number of times where AVCC NG occurs during a life
RoutineEntryStatus
Data.Comment: Routine entry status for recive data

Data.Name: 21_01_#51_bit2_Filtered Poor Joint Detector Input Port Flug
21_08_#04_DTC area use possible BANK of EEPROM
21_08_#05_B0_negative Precondition flag for diagnosable modules over 7V
141B_IR Sensor NG flag in Current IGN cycle
1419_Number of times where AVCC NG occurs during a life
1409_current sensor Offset value for current calculation
1408_25V Reference Voltage Filtered Value of Wake Up
1404_Current sensor A/D value after offset correction
